summaries.title: VPS RAM Orchestrator Worker — multi-layer RAM pressure management with worker pausing and task deferral
summaries.summary: The VPS RAM Orchestrator Worker implements multi-layer RAM pressure management by separating sensing (RAMMonitor), policy (RAMScheduler), and actuation (WorkerPauseManager) into distinct modules. A 4-state state machine with hysteresis prevents oscillation, while worker criticality levels enable graceful degradation by pausing only non-essential workers under increasing RAM pressure. This modular architecture allows independent testing and replacement of each layer.
